multiplicity.family: scenario-level exact Adaptive Palace versus Full Palace paired success tests

caveats: This is an exploratory pilot and is not powered to establish non-inferiority.
This is an interim analysis with 1 of 16 planned trials loaded; intervals and p-values are not final.
Efficiency metrics include only pairs where both compared arms achieved protocol-defined success.
Invalid infrastructure or treatment runs are retained but excluded from paired estimates; agent failures and timeouts remain outcomes.
